calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-07-2006 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2006 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brenda Cruz Keith for/with Ghada Haddad; Raquel Fox limited scope attorney for/with Victor Reyes

Settlement conference held. Raquel Fox translates into Spanish language for Defendants and parties place a stipulated settlement on the record as follows: Plaintiff to have restitution and possession of premises located at 1158A York Street aka 1158 1/2 York Street. Defendants to vacate premises in broom clean condition by 5:00 pm on July 31, 2006 and deliver keys to Mr. Collins @ 3236 - 21st Street. If Defendants comply, Plaintiff will waive back rent owed through July 31, 2006, attorney fees, and Defendants will be entitled to receive $1000 plus $1150 security deposit. A dismissal with prejudice will then be filed. If Defendants do not comply, Plaintiff will obtain a judgment for possession, back rent owed and attorney fees. Money owed will be deducted from the security deposit and no further stays allowed. Parties enter enter a mutual release and waiver. Stipulation for entry of judgment or in the alternative dismissal with prejudice is signed and filed. Trial date is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Will Chen; Clerk Kay Peek, Reporter Lisa Sarto CSR #8994 (218)
